name: log-watch
description: Evidence-first monitoring triage worker. Wakes on schedule and deterministic monitoring alerts, treats monitor output as hypotheses rather than diagnoses, clusters related templates before filing, routes verified-benign shapes to acknowledgement instead of the work queue, embeds lifetime and persistently observed cadence/cardinality/sample evidence in replicated tasks, and notifies exactly once through the daemon dispatcher. The pre-execution gate preserves zero model spend on genuinely quiet, trustworthy windows.
prompt_template: Managed by workertemplates.HardenedLogWatchPrompt during seed publication.
